jsonLd.title: Hiring Store Manager at FoodWorld
jsonLd.description:
FoodWorld is actively seeking a talented and motivated Store Manager to join our dynamic team in Surat. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About FoodWorld:
FoodWorld is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Monitor inventory levels and coordinate replenishment activities
• Assist in recruiting, onboarding, and performance management of staff
• Conduct regular stock audits and prevent pilferage
• Coordinate with the supply chain team for timely stock delivery
• Handle customer queries, complaints, and escalations effectively
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Visual Merchandising
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in E-commerce Integration
• Proficiency in Retail Operations
• Proficiency in KPI Management
• Proficiency in Shrinkage Control
• Proficiency in Category Management
• Proficiency in Planogram

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Life and accident insurance
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Learning & development budget
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Surat, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with FoodWorld!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
